fix.problem: No recorded decision covers the missing logo and badge PDF master; executor has no guidance on how to handle these gaps
fix.prompt_delta: Add two DECISIONS entries: (1) event_logo — assumed generated as raster PNG by this pack then vectorized by image_vectorize; (2) badge_pdf_master — assumed client will supply at execution; document_convert_pdf step is blocked until received. Also add a decision confirming roster.json is rendered to roster.csv by the connector before document_merge_data_layout.

top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 9): No InDesign templates (.indd files) have been supplied — the entire workflow hinges on client-authored badge.indd and certificate.indd with genuine Data Merge placeholders, but zero .indd files exist in this handoff. Without them, nothing merges and nothing prints.

AGENT CHOKE on 'attendee_headshots[0]': The agent must run image_select_subject then image_fill_area to isolate each subject and drop in the teal-navy backdrop, but this shot has a busy multi-person background with complex hair edges and an existing lanyard — automated subject selection will produce ragged masks and bleed background figures into the cutout, causing the fill step to corrupt the headshot before it ever reaches the merge frame.
Completeness 5/10: Event logo (raster) is absent — image_vectorize step has no input; this is a mandatory brief-listed asset
Executability 6/10: image_vectorize step has no raster logo input — chain breaks at that step
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 9.7/10, but package Executability scored 6 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
Per-asset self-QC averages 9.7/10, but package Completeness scored 5 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
